name: run-tests
description: Run tests (pytest or jest) with auto-detection or explicit --framework flag, env config, output limiting, grep filtering, warning suppression, and framework-specific flags, replacing separate run-pytest and run-jest scripts.

parameters.name: test_path
parameters.description: Test file or directory path (multiple allowed)

parameters.name: --config
parameters.description: Path to env config file (KEY=VALUE) or jest config

parameters.name: --framework
parameters.description: Force framework: auto (default), pytest, or jest

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N lines of output (pytest default: 50, jest default: 30)

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show first N lines of output

parameters.name: --timeout
parameters.description: Run with timeout in seconds (pytest only)

parameters.name: --clear-cache
parameters.description: Remove jest cache before running (jest only)

parameters.name: --summary
parameters.description: Show only test summary lines PASS/FAIL/Suites/Tests (jest only)

examples.expected: Filtered test results (warnings suppressed) showing PASSED/FAILED/ERROR lines

cost_saving_rationale: Merges run-pytest and run-jest into one script, reducing script count and prompt cost; auto-detection saves agent from specifying framework; collapses cd + env + test flags + output filtering into one step, saving 4-6 agent steps per test run.
